title: DALL-E 3 Cheat Sheet
description: Quick guide to using DALL-E 3 for image generation.

commands.command: Create an image of a futuristic cityscape
commands.description: Generates an image of a futuristic city.
commands.scenario: When you need a visual for a sci-fi project.

commands.command: Generate a painting of a sunset over the ocean
commands.description: Creates a digital painting of a sunset scene.
commands.scenario: For use in a calming, nature-themed design.

commands.command: Design a logo for a tech startup
commands.description: Produces a logo concept for a technology company.
commands.scenario: When starting a new tech business and need branding.

commands.command: Visualize a character from a fantasy novel
commands.description: Creates an image of a fantasy character.
commands.scenario: When illustrating a character for a book or game.

commands.description: Generates an illustration of a historical scene.

commands.scenario: When you need unique art for a modern space.

commands.command: Make a cartoon version of a pet
commands.description: Generates a cartoon-style image of a pet.
commands.scenario: For fun or as a gift for a pet lover.

commands.description: Creates a concept sketch of a future vehicle.
commands.scenario: For a design project or creative inspiration.

commands.description: Generates an image of a fantasy world landscape.
commands.scenario: When designing a setting for a game or story.

commands.description: Produces an image of a vintage poster design.

commands.scenario: For artistic projects or personal enjoyment.

commands.description: Generates an illustration suitable for a children's book.
commands.scenario: When creating visual content for kids' literature.

commands.description: Produces an image of a futuristic clothing design.
commands.scenario: For fashion design inspiration or projects.

commands.description: Generates a single panel for a comic strip.
commands.scenario: When illustrating a comic or graphic novel.

commands.command: Add 'aspect ratio 16:9' or 'aspect ratio 9:16' to change image orientation for presentations or mobile screens
commands.description: Control the shape of your image to fit specific formats like cinematic wide-screen or vertical social media stories.

commands.command: Use 'in the style of [Specific Medium]' such as 'claymation', 'isometric 3D render', or 'watercolor' to control texture
commands.description: Go beyond general art styles by specifying exact physical mediums to get highly consistent visual textures.

commands.command: Describe a 'top-down bird's eye view' or 'macro close-up shot' to control camera perspective
commands.description: Direct the 'camera' of the AI to change the scale and angle of the subject for more professional compositions.

commands.command: Request a 'flat vector illustration with a limited color palette' for professional UI/UX assets
commands.description: A specific workflow for creating clean, modern icons and website graphics that are easy to integrate into designs.

commands.command: Use 'consistent character' prompts by describing a character's specific unique features in detail across multiple prompts
commands.description: A technique to maintain visual continuity for a character when generating multiple different scenes.
